stdout: {"status":"completed","message":"Narrowed thm:feasible-conservative-wald so its sharpness claim matches the proved scope (pointwise shortest only within the observed-data variance-envelope Wald family), updated the theorem proof/justification/gap/consumer accordingly, added Harshaw-Middleton-Savje (2021) and Park-Wager (2026) as the missing closest variance comparators, and tightened tldr/project_justification/related_work/honest_scope to delimit the novelty claim against those frameworks while preserving the existing kernel claim and assumptions.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/exp_ego_cluster_exposure_clt/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Revised the core in place to rescope the CLT/feasible-Wald results to the explicit variance-regular regime sigma_n^2>=c_sigma/n, renamed the CLT-qualified class accordingly, sharpened theorem/prose fields to state that this lower bound is consumed rather than derived from primitive overlap counts, and rewrote lem:uniform-oracle-wald-coverage so it carries its own quantitative Stein remainder with explicit depends_on on lem:ht-unbiased-bounded and lem:dependency-graph-normal-bound.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/exp_ego_cluster_exposure_clt/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Revised the core in place to resolve the theorem-level closest-comparator finding by sharpening thm:feasible-conservative-wald and its dependent prose: the theorem statement and proof now identify the exact add-on as the realized-data completion program Vbar_n = max_{y in F_n^obs} Q_n(y), specify the precise sharpness family as completion-wise dominating observed-data variance envelopes for the fixed HT contrast, and distinguish that family from the closest Harshaw-Middleton-Savje interference conservative-variance comparator and the broader Park-Wager minimal-conservativeness program. Propagated the same framing through lem:variance-envelope-sharp, tldr, project_justification, related_work, and honest_scope.
